text: “Registered owner” means a person whose name appears in the records of the Department as the person to whom the vehicle is registered.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.108 — “Registered owner” defined.

“Registered owner” means a person whose name appears in the records of the Department as the person to whom the vehicle is registered.

subsections.text: “Registered owner” means a person whose name appears in the records of the Department as the person to whom the vehicle is registered.
